resources.string: Verification code has been sent to:
The code you entered is incorrect.
Please use a non-private email address for contact
A verification code will be sent to the provided email address.
Please provide your preferred name or title.
Hello! What should we call you?
You can always change it later.
Password change complete!\nThis will be your new password.
The two passwords do not match.
Use 8–18 characters, including a letter and a number
This email and password combination is incorrect.
We will send a password reset verification code to %s.
Generate an AI summary based on the following files:
I\'m everyLink AI, your personal AI assistant.
AI summary in progress. Please wait.
Select up to 5 files for AI analysis and summary. Click ‘Continue’ to begin.
The result cannot be saved. \nAre you sure you want to go back to the previous page?
AI summarizing in progress. Please wait.
Generate an AI summary based on the following files:
The text length is too long. \nPlease consider summarizing it manually first.
Unable to use this feature due to insufficient text length.
By becoming a member, you gain access to an AI Summary service. \nAre you sure you want to upgrade?
everyLink is running in the background…
There are other transcription tasks being processed
There are other upload tasks being processed
Once files are deleted, they can’t be recovered.\nHowever, members can restore them within 15 days.
Delete local, cloud and device audio
Are you sure to delete this record?
This file is not synchronized. Do you want to synchronize it first?\nUnsynchronized files cannot be restored after deletion
Are you sure you want to delete this file from the recycle bin?\nIt cannot be recovered after deletion
The recording duration is too short to be saved.\nWould you like to continue recording or delete this recording?
Search for meeting name, location, participants
The current network is poor, synchronization failed. Please try again later
The account number is entered incorrectly
The verification code is entered incorrectly
Restoring interrupted audio, please do not exit the APP…
Interrupted audio recovery, please try again later
Calendar permission denied. Please enable it manually.
In order to use the camera to take photos and set avatars, we need to apply for camera permission.
Follow the unsubscribe process based on your mobile system
* You have not finished yet. You still need to follow the unsubscribe process based on your mobile system.

1. Tap Settings.
 2. Tap your name.
 3. Tap Subscriptions.
 4. Tap the subscription.
 5. Tap Cancel Subscription.(you might need to scroll down)
 * If there is no Cancel button or you see an expiration message, the subscription is already canceled.

1. Tap the Google Play app.
 2. Tap the profile icon.
 3. Tap Payments & subscriptions.
 4. Tap subscriptions.
 5. Check the list of subscriptions for expired or declined payment methods.
Select new plan, it will start next year.
Select new plan, it will start next month.
For your account security, you need to verify your email
Verify your phone for your account security
Please enter a new email account
Please enter a new phone number
The account number was entered incorrectly
Please enter a new email account
Please enter a new phone number
Please verify your new email account
Please verify your new phone number
Click again to exit the app
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are you sure you want to clear all chat history?
Are you sure you want to delete these files?
Error in validating the end of data received flag
(Maximum size: 30mb)\nFor payment issues, check the FAQs.
The text field cannot be empty.
Tell Us More About the Issue
By submitting, you agree to let us use this information to resolve your issue.
We\'ve received your message and will get back to you as soon as we can.
Are you sure you want to submit the form?
You may choose up to two options.*
The saved content cannot be empty
Switch layout with the top-right icon. \nHold the mic icon to speak.
Copy and paste it into a browser to open.
Copy the link to download the everyLink app.
By subscribing to the membership, you can enjoy the function of creating folders
We need to apply for permission to implement related functions.
If you delete your everyLink account, you won’t be able to log in with it anymore. Are you sure you want to continue?
Deleted items cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete?
Are you sure you want to delete this folder?\nDon\'t worry, deleting this folder will not delete the files inside your folder.
Do you want to delete this image?
Are you sure to cancel noise reduction?
Operation failed.\nYou can manually reactivate it on the device page.
Press and hold the indent on top of the left earbud.
You now have access to all PRO features.
No device connection. Please try again.
After setup, it will auto-connect in the future
New firmware version detected. Update recommended.
Failed to download the new firmware version. Please try again.
Successfully found the following available devices
Please select the recording to delete
Firmware update failed. Please put the earphones in the charging case, restart them, and try again.
Firmware update successful. Please place the headphones in the charging case, restart them, and continue using.

【Device Status】
• Please keep the device connected and avoid placing it in the device case.
• Ensure the device has sufficient battery to avoid interruptions during the update.

【Update Process】
• Please do not leave the current screen, as the device may automatically restart after the update is completed.
• During the restart, the connection to the app may be temporarily disconnected.

【Reconnect After Restart】
• After restarting, the device will attempt to automatically reconnect to the app.
• If the automatic connection fails, please try reconnecting manually.
You are using the %s function\nPlease save the recording before using other recording functions
The headset has been disconnected and has automatically switched to the phone conversation mode. Do you want to continue?

*The following steps are required for the first operation, and it will connect automatically afterwards:\n1.Turn on Bluetooth in Settings and connect the device.\n2.Click the device image below to associate the device.
Each person wears one earphone. \nPress and hold to speak, release to end.
The app will select the earphone microphone for recording.
This feature is only available for devices compatible with this brand
Earphone WiFi is closing, please wait…
After the change is successful, you can log in using your new email account.
Next time, log in with the new email account
You still retain all PRO benefits
The authentication function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
Share text function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
The sharing text function can only be enabled after transcribing
Currently, only AAC/WAV/MP3/M4A/WMA/FLAC audio formats are supported for import and transcription
The recording information can only be viewed after cloud synchronization
The labeling function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
You can select up to 20 files at once
Allow others to save files to their account.
(Share will expire immediately after reading once)
Online sharing function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
The editing function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
After audio transcription, it can be translated. Would you like to transcribe first?
Translation can only be enabled after transcribing
The transcription function can only be enabled after cloud synchronization
First, long press right button for 3s
The maximum number of folders has been reached
Drag the slider to set the font size
Changes will affect transcription and translation font size
The account number is entered incorrectly
The verification code is entered incorrectly
Please set a new password (8–18 digits plus letters)
Glasses started taking photos. Please import from App Album.
Glasses started recording. Please import from App Album.
Glasses finished recording. Please import from App Album.
You can only insert up to 5 images at most
You can only insert up to %d images at most
PRO members can insert up to %d images at most
1.Open the Voice Memos or a similar app.\n 2.Select the audio file.\n 3.Click on the Share option to import it into everyLink.
1.Save the audio you want to import using the system\'s Files app.\n 2.Simply tap Open.
Please fill in the company bank account number
Please fill in the company bank account
Please fill in the company\'s registered address
Please fill in the company registration phone
Please enter your suggestions and feedback…
This language is being optimized and is currently unavailable
Failed to get location. Please check if GPS or network signal is normal.
More features and services are available after logging in
Device battery is below 15%. Please charge now to ensure app functions normally.
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Insufficient sync space, would you like to clean up already synchronized files?
Cloud storage full \n Can\'t sync to cloud after recording
Insufficient cloud storage space, please recharge as soon as possible
Voice memo cannot be recovered after deletion
Try saying: Revise meeting minutes today at 3pm
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
The file has not been synced yet. Would you like to sync it before deleting?
Your new plan will start after your original plan ended.
A new version has been released, please go to Google Play to upgrade.
There is no existing summary. \nPlease create a summary before using this function.
Please tap AI summary function first.
There are currently no files. Start using everyLink!
Are you sure you want to delete this paragraph?\nThis action cannot be undone.
Tip: Call ended and automatically saved
Tip: Bluetooth disconnected and automatically saved
The recording has reached its maximum duration, it has ended and automatically saved
Recording in progress, real-time transcription experience is about to end. Click to continue real-time transcription (%ss)
Recording in progress, real-time transcription experience has ended. After saving, full transcription is available
This recording will reach the maximum transcription duration of 2 hours. It is recommended to end and save
This recording has reached the maximum transcription duration for a single session. Please save it in time
Notification: Call ended, audio has been automatically saved
The simultaneous interpretation experience is about to end during the recording. Click to continue with simultaneous interpretation (%ss)
The simultaneous interpretation experience has ended during the recording\nAfter saving, the entire text can be transcribed and translated
The simultaneous interpretation experience is about to end during the recording
This simultaneous interpretation session will reach a maximum single-use duration of 40 minutes and will be automatically saved
The scanning device requires location services. Please enable location services before scanning.
Current battery is below 50%. Please charge to 50% before updating firmware.
Choose a payment method you prefer. After clicking an option, the system will automatically redirect.
Function is being improved\nPlease be patient
Permission denied, please enable it in settings
Access to nearby devices or Bluetooth permissions denied
This feature can only be used while on call
Or you can choose other one-time options.
Welcome to use \"everyLink\". We attach great importance to the protection of your personal information and privacy. Before you use the \"everyLink\" service, please read
. We will use your personal information in accordance with the terms you have agreed to in order to provide you with services.
If you agree to this policy, please tap Agree to start using our products and services. We are committed to protecting your personal information.
Start with a 1 month free trial

Please read carefully and fully understand the terms of \"Service Agreement\" and \"Privacy Policy\", including but not limited to: In order to provide you with instant messaging, content sharing and other services, we need Collect your personal information, operation logs, etc.You can read
Learn more. If you agree, please click \"Agree\" to start accepting our services.

, we aim to help you understand the services we provide, how we handle personal information, and the rights you have. We will strictly comply with relevant laws and regulations and take various security measures to protect your personal information. We value the protection of personal information for minors/children, so if you are under 18 years old, please read and agree to the above agreement and related privacy policy under the guidance of your guardian.

. By clicking the \"Agree\" button, you acknowledge and agree to the above agreement and the following terms: 1. In order to ensure the safe operation of the software and account security, we may request to collect your device information, IP address, and MAC address. 2. Uploading recordings and taking pictures requires the use of your microphone, storage, and camera permissions. 3. We respect your right to choose, and you can access, modify, delete your personal information, and manage your authorization. We also provide channels for cancellation and complaints.
获取系统录音权限被拒绝
你可以使用系统录音录制音频
获取系统相机权限被拒绝
只能选择 %1$ds 至 %2$ds内的视频
最大只能选择 %1$ds 以内的视频
不能选择低于 %1$ds 内的视频
你可以使用相机拍摄照片或视频
读取内存卡权限被拒绝
你最多只能选择%1$s个音频
你最多只能选择%1$s张照片
你最多只能选择%1$s个视频
音频最低选择不能少于%1$s个
图片最低选择不能少于%1$s张
视频最低选择不能少于%1$s个
不能同时选择图片或视频
After the purchase is completed, the system will automatically select the plan with the earliest expiration date.
Exiting the page will stop the current download. Confirm exit?
After transcription, you can view the text content. Would you like to transcribe immediately?
A simple, pure and efficient audio and text note-taking software
Other tasks are currently in progress. \nPlease try again later.
Please fill in the recording name
Meeting name cannot contain special characters
Noise cancellation in progress. Please wait.
Speak your language, hear theirs—translation both ways.
Transcribe and record nearby conversations with earphones.
In order to use the microphone to record audio, we need to apply for recording permission.
Members can enjoy synced files and 15-day recovery rights in the recycle bin upon subscription
The account number was entered incorrectly
The verification code is entered incorrectly
Please set a password (8–18 digits plus letters)
Please read and agree to the everyLink User Agreement
Didn\'t receive the code? \nCheck your inbox, spam folder, and ensure the email address is correct.
The verification code is entered incorrectly
Please set a password (8–18 digits plus letters)
The selected languages on both sides cannot be the same.
Please select at least one segment
Too Many Attempts: Please try again later.
Session expired, please log in again
User verification failed, please log in again
Session Expired: Please log in again
Too many requests, please try again later
This account has been deactivated, can be re-registered after 30 days
File status is already in the recycle bin
Failed to save file, file does not belong to Tencent Cloud or Aliyun
File status is not in the recycle bin
Too many transcription attempts for the audio
Transcription service is busy, please try again in 5 minutes
Transcription service is busy, please try again in 5 minutes
The translated language cannot be the same as the original
Audio cloud file does not exist
Only PRO users can generate links that can be shared and saved
Too many audio files for sharing
Sharing status is not set to saveable
Users cannot save their own shared audio files
Failed to retrieve Paypal access token
Payment method is not supported for the time being
The welfare is not within the activity time
You are not a new user
The number of folders has reached the maximum limit
Cannot have folders with the same name
The folder order does not exist
Too many batch operations for folders
Audio exists in multiple system folders
Audio already exists in system folder
There is an AI task in progress, please try again after completion
Network error, please try again later
Note: After the account is cancelled, the following information will be cleared and cannot be retrieved
1.After the account is cancelled, all obtained or purchased service benefits will become invalid and cannot be restored or refunded.
Cloud disk files: including audio recordings, transcription results, translation results, etc.

Please make sure that all transactions have been completed and there are no disputes. The return of funds that may arise from historical transactions after account deletion will be regarded as automatic abandonment
I understand the risks and wish to proceed with the account cancellation
App will automatically return to the home page after %ss
Change password, change mobile number, change email
Cannot recover after logout, please operate with caution
For your account security, you need to verify your phone
Delete local data after sync to cloud
Auto upload to cloud after recording is complete
Please upgrade storage or clean files
Are you sure you want to sign out?
Users who complete the information for the first time, after filling in the information,\nthe system will automatically issue 500 points!
Local audio files will be permanently deleted after cleaning，continue？
Audio data from real-time recording cannot be recovered once it is deleted.
Clearing cache does not impact normal usage of the app.
Auto sync to cloud under Wifi environment
Success!\nView the file in “Shared with Me.
Share files directly with everyLink users
The network signal is weak, the service has been disconnected, and the recording has been saved
The current account is logged in on other devices!
The current account is logged in on other devices!
Authentication failed, please log in again
If the device cannot be found, please make sure that your phone\'s Bluetooth is turned on.
Press, hold, and swipe left on a specific paragraph.
Tap the highlight icon to add this paragraph to the highlight page.
Check if the device is connected, then return to the everyLink app and try reconnecting the headphones again.
Tap the edit notes icon to edit notes
Insufficient device storage space, unable to import!

In order to save recording files, import external audio for transcription, insert images into the transcription content list, and upload images to set avatars, we need to apply for storage permission.
Thank you for becoming a PRO member. \nReceipts will be automatically sent through the Apple/Android system every month.
Press again to exit the application

General duration is applicable to all transcription scenarios, which can be used for voice and text shorthand, simultaneous interpretation, and can also be used for importing file transcription and audio refinement.
The general duration package is valid within 90 days from the date of recharge. It will be automatically invalidated after the expiration date. Please purchase it in moderation.
Value-added services are virtual time resources. Once you have successfully purchased them, they cannot be transferred, exchanged or extended.
cannot be transferred, exchanged or extended.
Your time is less than 30 minutes
Your time is less than 3 hours

1. Time duration resource package supports multiple specifications, and the corresponding validity period is subject to the actual marking on the page. The unused part will expire after the validity period expires. 
 2. Prepaid resource packages are not refundable, transferable, or extendable after purchase. 
 3. The time resources included in the membership package are only valid for use in the current month (within 31 days from the date of purchase); the general time resources purchased by recharge are valid for use within 90 days from the date of purchase. 
 4. Under normal circumstances, the official will automatically issue free trial time (duration is uncertain) to users in the form of resource packages on the 1st of each month, and the gifted time is only valid in the current month. 
 5. If you have not purchased a paid resource package, you can continue to record after all free resource package time is used up, but you cannot perform text transcription. 
 6. If you purchase multiple paid resource packages such as membership and time recharge at the same time, they will be deducted in the order of the expiration of the purchased resource packages. 
 7. The deduction order of time resource packages with the same validity period: basic free resource package > welfare limited-time resource package = paid resource package.
Regular users can import audio files up to a maximum of 1 hour\nUpgrading to PRO allows for a maximum audio file duration of 5 hours
The current maximum audio file duration supported for PRO users is 5 hours
Currently, only audio files with a duration of less than 3 hours are supported for import
Currently, only audio files with a duration longer than 5 seconds are supported for transcription import
Regular users can import audio files up to a maximum of 300MB\nUpgrading to PRO allows for a maximum audio file size of 500MB
The current maximum audio file size supported for PRO users is 500MB
Currently, only audio files smaller than 300MB are supported for transcription import
Sync storage space is full, unable to initiate sync sharing. Upgrade membership to enjoy 10GB storage space
Insufficient sync space\nUnable to sync after recording
Not enough storage space for file syncing, upgrade membership to enjoy 10GB storage space
Regular users can have up to 20 conversations per day.\nPRO members have no usage limits.
Reconversion will overwrite edited content and highlight. Are you sure you want to continue?
Re-translating will overwrite edited content and highlight. Are you sure you want to continue?
File does not exist or has been deleted
The audio file is not synced or has been cleaned up
Account exception, please contact customer service
Service exception, please try again later
The current service is busy, please try again later
Import of this audio format is not currently supported (recommend using .wav/.mp3)
Current network is poor, please switch to a different network
Service exception, please try again later
Due to network differences, usage outside mainland China may be unstable\nIt is recommended to enable applications like Quickfox, UU Accelerator, etc., for synchronized use
Recommended for use outside mainland China
Transcription failed, would you like to retry?
The transcription service is currently busy. Please try again in 5 minutes
Recording in progress, no available real-time transcription duration
After transcription, you can view the transcribed content. Please transcribe it on the Files page
Recording in progress, current service is busy, full transcription available after saving
You’ve run out of available time. Some features will no longer be available.
Insufficient available duration, less than 30 minutes
Transcription is expected to take a few minutes, please wait…
This interpretation session is about to end. It will automatically save after 45 minutes
Recording in progress. The interpretation experience has ended. After saving, the entire transcript can be generated
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
There are %d files that have not been synchronized. Please check if the files have been transcribed.
Unlimited Time\nThis is a test feature available for Pro members only, Using this feature will not consume your time.
Deleting files that have not been uploaded to the cloud cannot be undone. \nAre you sure you want to proceed with the deletion?
Service update failed, please check if the current network connection is good and make sure to retry after running the APP in the foreground!
Please update Google Play Store app

The new version has optimized the cloud service function, and the service update is being prepared. Please keep running in the foreground to ensure that the current network status is good. The service is being automatically updated, please wait…
The file upload is not complete. \nAre you sure you want to go back to the previous page?
Usage limit exceeded.\nWould you like to upgrade to PRO?

When PRO membership is downgraded to standard, some features will be inaccessible. \nAdditional purchased hours can still be used without PRO privileges. To regain PRO features, reinstate PRO membership
Each audio file can include up to 10 images
This feature is available for Pro users only.
Recurring billing; auto-renews on the 31st day
The current network is not good, continuing to record and trying to resume transcription…
Internet connection is weak, but the recording will continue. You can re-transcribe it afterward.
